sessions.summary: Integrity Shield built and tested — 157 files SHA-256 sealed, boot modal, mid-session Ops hook. Guard seal expanded to assets/docs/tools/root. wormbot_env untracked (1542 files). secure_storage.db untracked. MODULE_AUTHORING_GUIDE.md written (593 lines). Venv path corrected: ~/Ethica/Ethica_env. Repo clean at 59caa10.

M2.7 confirmed primary. .gitignore written. gage_env untracked (41k files). Tool Appendix rewritten (36 modules/138 tools). README written. Usage tracker built (both registries). Adaptive context router built (keyword + usage). Ops filelink Unicode fix. fm_list default path fix. Repo clean. 140 sealed. git c85e229.

Model matrix completed — minimax primary confirmed. Tool Lister filter fixed. Reka model configurable. WormHunter cap configurable (500). River read last drop built with Gage Vision handoff. Startup prompt measured (3315 tokens). 36 modules, 140 sealed. git 11a7c7b.

Canvas context overflow fixed (1500 char cap). Path NameError in _scan_and_install fixed. Ops amber filelinks built. json_fix single-file reformatter built. worm_fix_json bulk runner — 50 files cleaned. Tool Lister built — 138 tools, grouped, filter, click-to-insert. 36 modules, 140 sealed. git 3c102cb.

River path bug closed — last_drop_path now stored in river_state.json, injected into River context. WormHunter built — autonomous bug scanner, extensible language modules, Easter Egg awakening message live in worm_feed.log. worm_hunt tool wired into CodeWorm + chat_engine, routes to Ops. README.md written. Git commit 100f51f. 36 modules, 139 sealed.
